title: Spider Spits Web│蜘蛛吐絲
description: Spiders can spits webs to trap their targets.│蜘蛛可以吐絲來困住目標。
body:
# Function│功能
## Spider's active skill: Spits web│蜘蛛主動技能：吐絲
- Charge time: 0.5 seconds│蓄力時間：0.5秒
- Cooldown time: 10-15 seconds│冷卻時間：10-15秒
- Skill effect: Launches a spider web at the target. If it hits a block or entity, it will place the spider web at the location. If it hits a mob, it will also apply a 60-second Weaving effect to that mob.│技能效果：向目標發射蜘蛛網，如果擊中了方塊或實體，會在原地放置蜘蛛網；如果擊中了生物，還會對該生物施加60秒盤絲效果。
## Spider passive skill: Web weaving│蜘蛛被動技能：結網
- Skill effect: Whenever a spider attacks a mob with the Weaving effect, a spider web is placed at its location.│技能效果：每當攻擊了具有盤絲效果的生物，在其位置放置蜘蛛網。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
